title: Umbra Poor Ores Immersive Engineering Addon
description: Adds Immersive Engineering generators to Umbra Poor Ores
body:
Immersive Engineering addon for Umbra Poor Ores:

Adds Immersive Engineering generator Tier 1 and 2
- Tier 1 Generates Poor aluminium, lead and nickel
- Tier 2 Generates Poor aluminium, lead, nickel, silver and uranium

Also adds recipes for Immersive Engineering aluminium, lead, nickel, silver and uranium ores.

Requires [Umbra Poor Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/umbra-poor-ores)\
and of course [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering)
